rationale: Keep: the cited 2004 JMR paper appears highly relevant as a likely mechanism/foundation source, since it models cross-country store-brand vs national-brand choice using perceived quality differentials, risk, and price/quality sensitivities—constructs that closely overlap with the 2010 paper’s quality-gap and willingness-to-pay framework. The citing note explicitly positions itself as extending prior private-label research with cross-country evidence, so this is not clearly an incidental background mention.
